description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a robust, angular body and a prominent upper receiver. The main body is finished in a dark blue-gray color, with a matte black grip and stock area that appears ergonomic and reinforced. The rifle includes a top-mounted sighting system, likely for precision aiming, and a short, exposed barrel at the front. The magazine is integrated into the lower section, suggesting a detachable box type, and the overall build is compact yet sturdy, suitable for urban operations. Subtle metallic accents and panel lines are visible, indicating a mix of metal and polymer construction. The rifle's design emphasizes durability, modularity, and ease of handling in close-quarters environments.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a dark blue-gray body, black ergonomic grip, and compact, robust build. Features a top-mounted sight, short barrel, and integrated magazine for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, sighting system, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the stock, grip, and magazine area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the sighting system.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the rifle's body contours, grip, and magazine housing.
